hero.label: Software Engineer · Angular Specialist · Madrid, Spain
hero.tagline: I build the dashboards airlines run their revenue on.
hero.description: 5+ years turning complex data into clear decisions, from revenue dashboards used by 10+ airlines at Amadeus to logistics platforms visualising 1,000+ processes across Europe.

projectsPreview.label: Selected Work
projectsPreview.title: Projects
projectsPreview.subtitle: Dashboards, data tools, and real-time visualisations. Built for real users at real scale.

items.title: Amadeus Revenue Analytics
items.description: Built the frontend for a revenue analytics platform used daily by 10+ airline clients. Interactive Angular dashboards with NgRx and cdk-virtual-scroll over 100,000+ records in real time.

items.title: Zetes Logistics Platform
items.description: Replaced 8 separate logistics dashboards with a unified Angular platform. Created a reusable data grid adopted across 10+ projects. Migrated from Angular v16 to v19, cutting cold-build time by 75% (3.5 min → <50s).

items.title: Jingle Jangle
items.description: Real-time audio analysis using Fourier transforms that extracts notes from a microphone stream and converts them to MIDI. Built during Erasmus at Aalto University.

items.title: Smart Mazda OBD Dashboard
items.description: OBD interface for real-time car diagnostics (speed, RPM, engine load, temperature) visualised with D3.js and streamed to a Node.js server. Personal project from Aalto.

footer.tagline: Data-driven interfaces for airlines and logistics.

projectsPage.title: Journey & Work
projectsPage.subtitle: Professional timeline and the projects that shaped my career as a software engineer.

items.title: Software Engineer
items.description: Developed and maintained 8 logistics dashboards in a single Angular application visualising 1,000+ processes. Built a reusable grid component adopted across 10+ projects. Migrated from Angular v16 to v19, cutting cold-build time by 75% (3.5 min → <50s). Pioneered LLM-assisted workflows for code review.

items.title: Software Engineer
items.description: Built the frontend for a revenue management platform used by 10+ airlines. Interactive Angular dashboards using NgRx state management and cdk-virtual-scroll over 100k+ records. Backend contributions in Java, C++ and Python within a 10-person Agile team.

items.title: Software Developer
items.description: Built a contact management tool from scratch: automated import from Excel and HTML, personalised email broadcasts to 1,000+ international contacts.

items.title: Master's in Software Engineering
items.description: Two-year programme covering advanced software architecture, distributed systems, and research methodology. Overlapped with the Vice-Rectorate role and preceded the move to Amadeus.

items.title: Erasmus: Machine Learning & Data Science
items.description: Macadamia programme: ML, data science, and AI coursework. Built a soccer result prediction model, a time-series analysis project, Jingle Jangle (real-time audio Fourier analysis), and Smart Mazda (OBD car diagnostics dashboard).

items.title: Software Developer
items.company: Informática El Corte Inglés / Inetum , Madrid
items.description: Bash automation scripts monitoring 300+ business processes. Assisted in migration to new virtual environments.

items.title: Robotics Teacher
items.description: Led 3 classes of 20–30 students (ages 9–12) in hands-on robotics. Designed the main group project: a robotic cable car built and programmed entirely by the students.

items.title: Software Developer
items.description: Built 5 interactive SCORM e-learning courses from PowerPoint source material, packaged for LMS deployment.

items.title: Software Developer
items.description: Java library wrapping 50+ legacy Visual Basic commands, decoupling the codebase from a brittle VB dependency and enabling incremental migration.

items.title: Software Developer
items.description: Java desktop application with MySQL backend for client management and marketing operations: contact records, campaign tracking, and basic reporting.

items.title: Bachelor's in Computer Science & Mathematics
items.description: Double degree covering algorithms, data structures, probability, statistics, linear algebra, and calculus. A quantitative foundation that shapes how I approach data visualization and complex problem-solving.

items.title: Amadeus Revenue Analytics
items.subtitle: Enterprise Data Visualisation
items.longDescription: Built the frontend for a revenue management application used by 10+ airline clients to optimise pricing strategies and monitor booking trends. Interactive Angular dashboards using NgRx state management and cdk-virtual-scroll over 100k+ records sourced from Oracle and MongoDB. Contributed to backend services in Java, C++ and Python within a 10-person Agile team.

items.title: Zetes Logistics Platform
items.subtitle: Angular Web Components Architecture
items.description: 8 dashboards, one app, shared across 10+ projects
items.longDescription: Designed and maintained a consolidation of 8 logistics dashboards into a single Angular application using Web Components and i18n, visualising 1,000+ processes. Built a reusable grid component with filtering, sorting, and custom features adopted across 10+ projects company-wide, cutting per-project UI development time by ~20%. Maintained a shared Angular component library used by 8 teams. Migrated from Angular v16 to v19 and Node v22, cutting cold-build time by 75% (3.5 min → <50s). Introduced LLM-assisted code review workflows, first on the team to adopt this.

items.title: Jingle Jangle
items.subtitle: Real-Time Audio Analysis
items.description: Fourier-based note detection and MIDI conversion
items.longDescription: Real-time audio analysis tool built during Erasmus at Aalto University. Uses Fourier transforms to extract musical notes from a live microphone stream and converts them to MIDI output. Python backend for signal processing, React and D3.js for the live frequency visualisation frontend. See it live at castrosignals.github.io/visuals/

items.title: Smart Mazda OBD Dashboard
items.subtitle: Car Diagnostics Visualisation
items.description: Real-time OBD data streamed and visualised with D3.js
items.longDescription: OBD (On-Board Diagnostics) interface for real-time car telemetry. Reads speed, RPM, engine load, and temperature from the vehicle's OBD port and streams the data to a Node.js server. Visualised with D3.js and React. Personal project from Aalto University. Source: github.com/castrosignals/Smart-Mazda-On-Board

contactCta.title: Need an Angular specialist who ships dashboards at scale?
contactCta.text: Open to roles where complex data meets clean UI. Let's talk.
